title: The World This Week | US Supreme Court strikes down Trump’s global tariffs, tensions with Iran reach a tipping point, India-Israel elevate ties - The Indian Express
summary: The US Supreme Court recently invalidated a set of global tariffs imposed by the previous administration, signaling a shift in international trade policy. Meanwhile, geopolitical landscapes are seeing heightened tensions with Iran and strengthened diplomatic relations between India and Israel.

title: World News in Brief: Geopolitical tensions impact global economy, Gaza aid funding shortfall, violence in South Sudan, UN condemns deadly mosque attack - UN News
summary: Global geopolitical tensions are currently exerting significant pressure on the world economy, exacerbating existing challenges. Concurrently, the UN is addressing a critical aid funding gap in Gaza, ongoing violence in South Sudan, and has condemned a recent deadly mosque attack.

title: From Japan to Israel, elections are reshaping global politics - ABC News & Headlines – Australian Broadcasting Corporation
summary: Recent electoral outcomes across various nations, including Japan and Israel, are significantly influencing the global political landscape. These democratic processes are leading to new leadership and policy directions that could have far-reaching international implications.

title: MeitY secretary says every social media user posting on current affairs can come under I&B oversight - ThePrint
summary: A top government official has stated that individuals posting about current events on social media platforms could potentially fall under the supervision of the Information and Broadcasting Ministry. This declaration highlights growing concerns over the extent of digital content regulation and its implications for freedom of speech in India.

title: How the Tenth Schedule regulates political defections - The Indian Express
summary: The Tenth Schedule of the Indian Constitution plays a critical role in preventing political defections by elected representatives. This constitutional provision aims to ensure stability in legislative bodies and uphold the integrity of party politics.

title: Communalism in India, Meaning, Causes, Effects, UPSC Notes - Vajiram & Ravi
summary: Communalism remains a significant socio-political challenge in India, characterized by the exploitation of religious identity for political gains. Understanding its origins and consequences is crucial for addressing its divisive impact on national unity and social harmony.

title: India-Nepal Relations - Vision IAS
summary: India and Nepal share a unique and historically deep relationship, encompassing cultural, economic, and strategic ties. Recent developments continue to shape this bilateral partnership, influencing regional stability and cooperation.

title: India–Bangladesh Ties: Reset Strategy for 2026 - Frontline Magazine
summary: India and Bangladesh are actively exploring new strategies to strengthen their bilateral relationship in 2026, focusing on enhanced cooperation across various sectors. This renewed approach aims to deepen economic integration and foster greater regional stability between the two nations.

title: IMF lowers 2026 global growth forecast to 3%, sees rebound in 2027 - Reuters
summary: The International Monetary Fund has revised its global economic growth projection for 2026 downwards to 3%. Despite this immediate slowdown, the organization anticipates a recovery in the subsequent year, 2027.

title: IMF warns inflation threat looms large over global economy - Financial Times
summary: The International Monetary Fund has issued a significant warning regarding the persistent threat of inflation to the worldwide economy. This alert suggests that rising prices could undermine global stability and growth prospects.

title: Stock market today: Nasdaq rises, Dow and S&P 500 retreat as oil prices climb on renewed US-Iran tensions - Yahoo Finance
summary: US stock markets displayed mixed performance, with the Nasdaq advancing while the Dow and S&P 500 experienced declines. This market divergence was primarily driven by escalating US-Iran tensions, which caused a notable increase in global oil prices.

title: Green Economy Hits $10 Trillion in Market Value - Inside Climate News
summary: The global green economy has achieved a significant milestone, reaching an impressive $10 trillion in market valuation. This growth highlights the increasing investment and focus on sustainable industries worldwide.

title: MARKET_TICKER
BSE turns 151: How Asia’s oldest stock exchange became India’s market pulse
summary: The Bombay Stock Exchange, Asia's oldest stock market, recently celebrated its 151st anniversary, marking over a century and a half of shaping India's financial landscape. This milestone highlights its enduring legacy and pivotal role in the nation's economic development and capital formation.

title: Stock Market Holiday: NSE, BSE to remain shut on Friday for Muharram. Check upcoming market holidays
summary: Indian stock exchanges, NSE and BSE, observed a holiday for Muharram, leading to a temporary halt in trading activities. Investors are advised to review the official calendar for all upcoming market closures to plan their trading schedules effectively.

title: Nifty IT index gains 3.5% on Friday as TCS jumps 4% post Q1FY27 results
summary: The Nifty IT index experienced a significant surge, climbing 3.5% following the release of strong Q1FY27 results from Tata Consultancy Services. TCS shares notably jumped 4%, indicating positive investor sentiment towards the company's performance and the broader IT sector.

title: MRPL shares jump 9% as ONGC approves strategic oil reserve in Mangaluru
summary: Mangalore Refinery and Petrochemicals Ltd (MRPL) saw its shares surge by 9% after ONGC gave its approval for a strategic oil reserve project in Mangaluru. This development signals a significant expansion opportunity for MRPL and positive market confidence in its future prospects.

title: Sumeet Bagadia recommends these five breakout stocks to buy today — 10 July 2026
summary: Market expert Sumeet Bagadia has identified five breakout stocks, advising investors on potential buying opportunities for the current trading day. These recommendations aim to guide traders looking for short-term gains based on technical analysis and market momentum.

title: AI in Fintech Market Size, Industry Share, Forecast to 2034 - Fortune Business Insights
summary: This report projects significant growth for the AI in fintech market over the next decade, highlighting its expanding influence across financial services. The forecast indicates a robust future for artificial intelligence applications within the industry.

title: AI in Fintech: Use Cases, Stats, and Adoption Challenges - appinventiv.com
summary: This article explores the diverse applications of artificial intelligence within the fintech sector, alongside key statistical insights into its current penetration. It also addresses the significant hurdles and complexities faced during the implementation of AI technologies.

title: How banks are using AI in financial crime and compliance - FinTech Global
summary: Financial institutions are increasingly deploying artificial intelligence to combat sophisticated financial crimes and enhance regulatory adherence. AI tools are proving instrumental in identifying suspicious activities and streamlining compliance processes.

title: Nigeria Central Bank Mandates AI Tools for AML Monitoring - Dabafinance
summary: The Central Bank of Nigeria has issued a directive requiring financial institutions to implement AI-powered tools for anti-money laundering surveillance. This mandate underscores a growing global trend towards leveraging advanced technology for regulatory compliance and financial security.

title: Fintech & AI: The Rise of Embedded Finance in Everyday Platforms - intlbm
summary: This article discusses how the convergence of fintech and artificial intelligence is driving the expansion of embedded finance into various daily platforms. This integration allows financial services to be seamlessly incorporated into non-financial applications, enhancing user convenience.

title: Varo Bank to Accelerate Responsible and Customer-Focused AI Efforts with New Chief Artificial Intelligence Officer Asmau Ahmed - FF News
summary: Varo Bank has appointed a new Chief Artificial Intelligence Officer to spearhead its initiatives in responsible and customer-centric AI development. This strategic hire signals the bank's commitment to integrating advanced AI ethically and effectively into its operations.

title: Physical Intelligence: The Next Big AI Bet - BW Businessworld
summary: The field of "physical intelligence" is emerging as a significant new frontier in artificial intelligence, focusing on AI systems that can interact with and understand the physical world. This evolution promises to extend AI capabilities beyond digital realms into robotics and real-world applications, driving the next wave of innovation.

title: India’s AI Revolution Accelerates as Billion-Dollar Investments Reshape the Artificial Intelligence Market - Spherical Insights
summary: India is experiencing a rapid acceleration in its artificial intelligence sector, fueled by substantial billion-dollar investments that are fundamentally transforming the market landscape. This influx of capital is propelling the nation towards becoming a significant player in the global AI arena.

title: Artificial Intelligence and Future of India's IT Companies - Economic and Political Weekly
summary: Artificial intelligence is poised to profoundly reshape the operational models and strategic directions of India's information technology companies. This technological shift necessitates significant adaptation and innovation for these firms to maintain their competitive edge and foster future growth.

title: Evaluating the AI Threat to India’s IT Model - orfonline.org
summary: India's established IT services model faces potential disruptions and threats from the rapid advancements in artificial intelligence. A thorough evaluation is crucial to understand how AI could impact job markets, service delivery, and the overall economic structure of the sector.

title: India’s next AI leadership moment won’t be driven by GenAI alone - ET CIO
summary: India's future leadership in the artificial intelligence domain will depend on a broader strategy than solely focusing on generative AI technologies. Diversifying investments and expertise across various AI sub-fields will be essential for sustained innovation and global competitiveness.
